title: Anatomical Verification (Mendonça et al 2024)
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"8n3j0","text":"Protocol for anatomical verification (sample prep, immunostaining and imaging)  in Mendonça et al 2024. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
before_start: {"blocks":[{"key":"8opsm","text":"Animals were euthanized after completion of the behavioural tests.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Anaesthetize mice with isoflurane, followed by intraperitoneal injection of ketamine-xylazine (5 mg/kg xylazine; 100 mg/kg ketamine).
Perfuse transcardially in 1% phosphate buffered saline (PBS) and then 4% paraformaldehyde (PFA) in PBS.
Dissect brains after perfusion is completed.
Keep brains in 4% PFA solution overnight and then transferred to 1x PBS solution.
Section brains coronally in 30 to 50-um slices (using a Leica vibratome VT1000S) and keep in PBS before mounting or immunostaining.
Rinse 3 times with TBS (10 min each)
Images were taken using a wide-field fluorescence microscope (Zeiss AxioImager).

Peroxides treatment (inhibition peroxidase an permeabilization) 5 min 1.5 mL methanol 450 µL H 2 O 2 13.05 mL TBS (this step is for DAB staining but we kept it because it favors the penetrance of the Ab)
Rinse 3 times with TBS (10 min each)
Membrane permeabilization treatment 15min (or 20min for Ab that don’t penetrate well) 300 µL Triton 10% 14.7 mL TBS
Rinse 3 times with TBS (10 min each)
Blockade with BSA 3% or other blocking solutions 1h (if needed)
Primary Antibody (diluted in TBS): overnight at 4°C (or longer period if needed) TH (1:1000) Pel-Freez, Rogers, AR
Rinse 3 times with TBS (10 min each)
Secondary Antibody (diluted in TBS without) 40-45 min Room Temperature (1:400)
Rinse 2 times with TBS (10 min each) AND Rinse 2 times with TB (10 min each)
Mounting with Vectashield or PVA DABCO
creator: Christine Weber-Schmidt
